title: Improve paragraph flow
subtitle: Use links between sentences.
overview: Module: Writing and Revision. B2 Med strengthens abstract discussion, source response, professional communication, precise style, revision, and independent output.

sections.title: B2 med focus
rows: Flow comes from relationships between ideas, not only from linking words.
流畅来自想法之间的关系，而不只是连接词。
B2 Med frame: write the idea, check the logic, adjust the tone, and make the language cleaner.
B2 Med 框架：写出想法、检查逻辑、调整语气，并让语言更干净。
Explain how to improve paragraph flow.
解释如何改善段落流畅度。
The first sentence makes the claim. The second sentence explains why it matters. The third sentence gives an example, and the final sentence returns to the main point.
第一句提出主张。第二句解释为什么它重要。第三句给例子，最后一句回到主要观点。

items.en: Flow comes from relationships between ideas, not only from linking words.
items.zh: 流畅来自想法之间的关系，而不只是连接词。

items.en: B2 Med frame: write the idea, check the logic, adjust the tone, and make the language cleaner.
items.zh: B2 Med 框架：写出想法、检查逻辑、调整语气，并让语言更干净。

items.en: The first sentence makes the claim. The second sentence explains why it matters. The third sentence gives an example, and the final sentence returns to the main point.
items.zh: 第一句提出主张。第二句解释为什么它重要。第三句给例子，最后一句回到主要观点。

items.en: I will make the idea precise before I try to make it sound advanced.
items.zh: 我会先让意思准确，再尝试让它听起来高级。

items.en: A strong B2 answer usually includes a condition, a limitation, or a fair counterpoint.
items.zh: 强 B2 回答通常包括条件、限制或公平的反方观点。

items.en: If the wording feels too abstract, I will add one concrete example from real life.
items.zh: 如果措辞感觉太抽象，我会加入一个来自真实生活的具体例子。

items.en: I can revise my answer for logic, tone, and rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以从逻辑、语气和节奏上修改我的回答。

items.en: This lesson is complete only when I can use the idea in my own words.
items.zh: 只有当我能用自己的话使用这个想法时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain how to improve paragraph flow.
lines.zh: 解释如何改善段落流畅度。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The first sentence makes the claim. The second sentence explains why it matters. The third sentence gives an example, and the final sentence returns to the main point.
lines.zh: 第一句提出主张。第二句解释为什么它重要。第三句给例子，最后一句回到主要观点。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the answer more precise or more concrete?
lines.zh: 你能让回答更准确或更具体吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will narrow the claim, add one example, and mention one limitation.
lines.zh: 可以。我会缩小主张、加入一个例子，并提到一个限制。

items.en: Explain how to improve paragraph flow.
items.zh: 解释如何改善段落流畅度。

items.en: Answer once in six sentences with a clear structure.
items.zh: 用六句话做一次结构清楚的回答。

items.en: Add one B2 phrase such as that said, in practice, arguably, or the real issue is.
items.zh: 加入一个 B2 短语，比如 that said、in practice、arguably 或 the real issue is。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite the strongest sentence more naturally.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后把最强的一句改得更自然。

items.en: Use the revised sentence tomorrow in a different topic.
items.zh: 明天在不同话题中使用修改后的句子。
